title: Close-out: mirror sync, render, manifest, full verify green + hermetic re-check
action: After all prior cells cap: (1) self-onboard to sync vendored mirrors: node skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --apply --repo-hooks --json (expect recheck up_to_date). (2) node scripts/render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs THEN node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write (render-then-manifest order, the recurring gotcha). (3) node scripts/run_verify.mjs foreground green. (4) hermetic re-check: env -u CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID -u BEE_SESSION_ID node scripts/run_verify.mjs also green. (5) run test_claim_race 10x consecutively green.

truths: run_verify green in both normal and session-env-scrubbed runs
mirrors and manifest in sync (test_plugin_distribution green inside the run)
prohibitions: Do not tag or push — release is a separate user decision
